body_txt: This trope is when a character (usually female) develops a tendency to giggle or even laugh when around their love interest , particularly when the love interest in question is joking around, or when they do something particularly romantic, such as Holding Hands . This may be accompanied by a Crush Blush . The Smitten Teenage Girl is particularly prone to this, hence the term "giggling like a schoolgirl," as are the Sickeningly Sweethearts . Giggling is also a sign of the character imagining themself doing things with their lover. For... less than stable characters , it shows their obsession with their love, and can overlap with Giggling Villain in extreme cases. This trope tends to be common in romantic comedies . This is Truth in Television (obviously). There's a reason Aphrodite had been called "the laughing goddess."
